title: Savory Crumbly Chinese Pistachio Dumplings
description: A savory and adventurous Chinese dish featuring pistachio, these dumplings are boiled to perfection and offer a low-fat-friendly option for those looking for a healthier meal. The combination of pistachio and traditional Chinese ingredients creates a unique flavor profile.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, pistachio meal, and salt.
Gradually add in the sesame oil and mix until the dough comes together.
Knead the dough for about 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into small balls, about the size of a small egg.
Roll out each ball of dough into a thin circle.
Place a small spoonful of chopped scallions and grated ginger in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Bring a large pot of water to a boil and gently add the dumplings.
Cook the dumplings for about 10-15 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Serve the dumplings hot with a dipping sauce made from the soy sauce and water.
